necessityProof.blockerResolved: N1 must keep shrinking repeated renderer code before N5 can safely lower file-count and unused-code ratchets.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: Phase-B renderer folding can consume this batch because each migrated renderer now declares a builder spec instead of owning its own markdown join contract.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The v2114 builder already supports entries, messages, lists, and raw lines, so this batch maps archiveFiles/archiveReferences/snippet lines into existing lines sections instead of creating another helper.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: The batch stops at ten no-helper archive verification renderers; helper-heavy disabled runtime shell and minimal integration renderers remain deferred.

focusedRendererBatch.command: npx vitest run test/verificationReportBuilder.test.ts test/governanceGrowthRatchet.test.ts and 10 migrated renderer test files --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest test loaded real profiles, rebuilt the old array-join markdown model, and asserted equality with each migrated renderer output.

lint.note: Warnings are the existing v2115 baseline.

archiveDeliverables: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2091-renderer-consolidation-batch-3-v2120.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2120 only changes Node markdown rendering implementation for existing local profiles; it does not request fresh sibling evidence or start upstream services.
